title: Startup CEO Charlie Javice is reportedly angling for a Trump pardon
summary: Charlie Javice, a startup CEO, is reportedly seeking a Trump pardon, raising concerns for JPMorgan. The situation suggests potential legal or regulatory complications involving the company. This reflects ongoing scrutiny of tech startup leadership and potential enforcement actions.
content: JPMorgan can't be pleased by any of this.

zh.title: 初创公司首席执行官查理·贾维斯据报道正在争取特朗普赦免
zh.summary: 初创公司首席执行官查理·贾维斯据报道正在寻求特朗普赦免，引发摩根大通的担忧。这种情况暗示可能存在涉及该公司的法律或监管问题。这反映了对科技初创公司领导层和潜在执法行动的持续关注。

title: The FBI built a small town to simulate cyberattacks
summary: The FBI opened a Cyber Range in Huntsville, Alabama, featuring a 22,000-square-foot replica town with buildings, infrastructure, and a data center containing over 200 servers for simulating cyberattacks. The facility allows the FBI to recreate real-world scenarios for training cybersecurity professionals in realistic environments. This training center mirrors the bureau's approach with Hogan's Alley for traditional law enforcement.
content:
There’s also a fake power company to jack up prices thanks to the fake data center. | Image: FBI	

Last year, the FBI opened a Cyber Range in Huntsville, Alabama, for simulating cyberattacks. Think of it sort of like the famous Hogan's Alley, but for modern digital crime training. It's a massive 22,000 square-foot replica of an entire town, complete with a convenience store, gas station, hospital, and even fully furnished houses.
It's a training facility where the bureau can recreate real-world scenarios for training and research purposes. All of the various buildings and facilities are hooked up the way they would be in a real town. There's even a small data center with over 200 servers that can be hacked, infected with malware, and stu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: FBI建造了一个小镇来模拟网络攻击
zh.summary: FBI在阿拉巴马州亨茨维尔开设了一个网络靶场，拥有一个22,000平方英尺的复制小镇，配有建筑物、基础设施和一个包含超过200台服务器的数据中心，用于模拟网络攻击。该设施允许FBI在现实环境中重现真实场景，以培训网络安全专业人员。这个培训中心反映了该局在传统执法中使用霍根巷的方法。

title: UK may ban social media for children under 16
summary: The UK is considering legislation to ban social media access for children under 16, following Australia's recent similar ban. The proposal reflects growing global concern about social media's impact on adolescents and signals a shift toward stricter age-based restrictions on digital platforms. This regulatory approach aims to protect younger users from potential harms.
content: The U.K. seems to be following Australia's lead in banning a wide swath of social media for teens.

zh.title: 英国可能禁止16岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
zh.summary: 英国正在考虑立法禁止16岁以下儿童访问社交媒体，效仿澳大利亚最近的类似禁令。该提议反映了全球对社交媒体对青少年影响的日益关注，并表明了向更严格的基于年龄限制数字平台的转变。这种监管方法旨在保护年轻用户免受潜在伤害。

title: China may have accessed Mythos
summary: The White House allegedly restricted exports of Anthropic's Mythos model due to concerns that a China-linked group gained access to it, posing significant national security risks. The incident highlights the potential for adversaries to reverse-engineer advanced AI systems through distillation techniques.
content:
According to a new report from Semafor, the White House's decision to impose export restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos was driven in part by fears that it had been accessed by a group linked to China. If the Chinese government actually had access to Mythos 5 or Fable 5, it would present a serious national security risk. The government could also attempt to reverse engineer the model through distillation, a method in which a "student" AI is trained on a more advanced model to replicate its behavior.
The White House has not confirmed this report, and a post on X by Trump advisor David Sacks did not mention China. Instead, Sacks focused on a r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 中国可能已获得对Mythos的访问权限
zh.summary: 白宫据称因担心一个与中国相关的组织获得了Anthropic的Mythos模型的访问权限而限制其出口，这对国家安全构成了重大风险。该事件突出了对手可能通过蒸馏技术对高级AI系统进行逆向工程的可能性。

title: As AI companies race to go public, who else is along for the ride?
summary: As artificial intelligence companies prepare for public market debuts, startups are attempting to leverage the momentum of high-profile IPOs like SpaceX to attract investor attention and capital. The trend reflects broader market enthusiasm for AI-driven ventures.
content: Startups are trying to "ride that SpaceX IPO wave."

zh.title: 当人工智能公司竞相上市，还有谁在跟风？
zh.summary: 随着人工智能公司准备进行IPO，初创公司正试图利用SpaceX等高调IPO的势头来吸引投资者的关注和资金。这一趋势反映了市场对AI驱动企业的广泛热情。

title: Conclave is the sound of a NYC summer block party
summary: A personal reflection on how the album 'Conclave' provided emotional respite during a difficult summer in New York City, with vivid memories of the opening track 'Habla' lifting the author's mood during a hot day. The piece captures how music can transcend challenging circumstances.
content:
Unlock a party. | Image: Conclave	

I have this vivid memory of walking to pick up my oldest from school in June of 2022. For a variety of reasons, I was in a very bad place mentally. And to make matters worse, it was brutally hot. I was depressed, angry with the world, sunburned, and soaked through with sweat. But as the second track on Conclave, "Habla," settled into its groove, I found myself unconsciously strutting. Not walking, but moving through the streets in lockstep with the music, just as a much-needed cool breeze kicked up, and some scaffolding afforded me a full block's worth of shade. For a brief moment, I found myself smiling for the first time in what felt like  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《Conclave》是纽约夏日街区派对的声音
zh.summary: 一篇个人思考文章，讲述专辑《Conclave》如何在纽约市困难的夏天提供了情感慰藉，开场曲《Habla》的生动记忆在炎热的日子里提升了作者的心情。这篇文章表现了音乐如何能够超越困难环境。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: SpaceX rockets past Tesla
summary: TechCrunch's mobility column examines how SpaceX is outpacing Tesla in transportation innovation and explores AI's growing role in the future of transportation. The column serves as a hub for tracking developments in next-generation mobility solutions.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

zh.title: TechCrunch 移动出行：SpaceX 超越特斯拉
zh.summary: TechCrunch 的移动出行专栏探讨了 SpaceX 如何在交通运输创新方面超越特斯拉，并探索了人工智能在未来交通运输中的日益重要的作用。该专栏是追踪下一代交通运输解决方案发展的中心。

title: Did a medieval flying monk spot Halley's comet, twice? It's complicated
summary: A University of Leicester historian suggests medieval monk Eilmer of Malmesbury may have witnessed two different comets in 1018 and 1066 rather than Halley's Comet twice, challenging traditional historical astronomical interpretations. The analysis illustrates the difficulties in validating observations from medieval sources.
content: University of Leicester historian thinks Eilmer of Malmesbury saw two different comets: in 1018 and 1066

zh.title: 中世纪会飞的僧侣发现了哈雷彗星两次吗？这很复杂
zh.summary: 莱斯特大学的一位历史学家认为中世纪修士马尔姆斯伯里的艾尔默可能在1018年和1066年目睹了两颗不同的彗星，而不是哈雷彗星两次，这挑战了传统的历史天文学解释。这项分析说明了从中世纪资料中验证观察结果的困难。

title: How to watch most of the World Cup matches with free trials
summary: Multiple streaming services offer free trials covering 2026 FIFA World Cup matches, with FuboTV providing a five-day trial and Peacock offering seven days for new Amazon account users. Strategic use of these trials can provide access to most or all tournament matches with minimal cost.
content:
GUADALAJARA, MEXICO - JUNE 11: In-Beom Hwang #6 of Korea Republic scores his team's first goal past Matej Kovar #1 of Czechia during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between Korea Republic and Czechia at Guadalajara Stadium on June 11, 2026 in Guadalajara, Mexico. (Photo by Lars Baron/Getty Images) | Getty Images	

Hoping to catch some World Cup matches while spending as little money as possible? You have a few options for finding a few days of free streaming, although you may choose to eventually pony up some money. That, or get creative by combining multiple offers to make it through the whole tournament. 
We found a handful of streaming services that are showing all of the World Cup matches. Most of these free trials require you to be a new subscriber, though you might just be able to use a different email address than before.
FuboTV
All FuboTV plans can stream every World Cup match, and each includes a five-day free trial for new members. The least expensive plan is $9.99 for the first month after the trial period, then $19.99 per month after that. Paying for one month after the trial should cover you through all (or most) of the finals, and is likely the least expensive way to watch every match.
My Best Buy Plus and Total members can claim an extended 30-day free trial, as long as they’re new to FuboTV.
FuboTV

Where to Buy:

 $19.99 at FuboTV (five-day free trial)

Peacock
There’s a Peacock Premium Plus trial offer if you sign up using your Amazon account that will grant you seven days of free access before you’re charged $15.99 per month. I was able to access the offer on an Amazon account without Prime, but your mileage may vary.
We also found multiple ways to potentially claim free Peacock through other paid subscriptions. Some Xfinity Internet plans include Peacock Premium, which you can learn more about on the company’s support page. Walmart Plus members can claim either Peacock Premium or Paramount Plus Essential, but only one at a time, with a 90-d

zh.title: 如何通过免费试用观看大多数世界杯比赛
zh.summary: 多个流媒体服务提供免费试用来观看2026年国际足联世界杯比赛，FuboTV提供五天试用，Peacock为新亚马逊账户用户提供七天试用。战略性地使用这些试用可以以最少的成本获得大部分或全部锦标赛比赛。

title: The new Sonos Play has become my go-to desk and kitchen speaker
summary: The latest Sonos Play speaker delivers versatile functionality for both indoor and outdoor use, serving as an effective solution for desk and kitchen environments. Its portability and audio quality make it an appealing choice for personal audio setups.
content: The new Sonos Play can act as a portable speaker inside and outside your home.

zh.title: 新款Sonos Play成为我办公桌和厨房的首选扬声器
zh.summary: 最新款Sonos Play扬声器为室内和室外使用提供多功能性，是办公桌和厨房环境的有效解决方案。其便携性和音频质量使其成为个人音频设置的有吸引力的选择。

title: The impossible dream of the universal remote
summary: The history of the Harmony universal remote illustrates why achieving a truly universal control solution has proven nearly impossible despite decades of attempts. Even the most successful universal remote faced fundamental challenges in seamlessly controlling all devices.
content:
You don't really ever have to explain why a universal remote is a good idea. You have a bunch of stuff that needs controlling; this thing controls them all. Many companies have set out to build a product worthy of this idea, and one product came much closer than most. It was called the Harmony, and for many years it was the best universal remote on the market. Maybe the only one that mattered. And still, even the Harmony couldn't make it work.
On this episode of Version History, we tell the story of the Harmony. The Verge's David Pierce, Nilay Patel, and John Higgins are joined by Matt Rogers, the CEO of Mill and former co-founder of Nest,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 万能遥控器的不可能之梦
zh.summary: Harmony万能遥控器的历史表明，尽管经过几十年的尝试，实现真正的万能控制解决方案仍然几乎不可能。即使是最成功的万能遥控器也面临着无缝控制所有设备的根本挑战。

title: Solid-state batteries still aren’t ready, but gels are
summary: While solid-state batteries remain not yet ready for widespread adoption, gel electrolyte batteries are emerging as a more viable near-term solution to replace volatile lithium-ion technology. The transition is driven by safety concerns from incidents like exploding e-bikes and combusting power banks.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on e-bikes, power stations, and how to work anywhere, follow Thomas Ricker. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Lithium-ion batteries are everywhere as we enter the second quarter of the 21st century, and that's a problem. From exploding e-bikes in stairwells to lithium-ion power banks combusting midflight, the volatile nature of traditional liquid electrolytes has become an undeniable public safety hazard. 
In 2025, the US Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 固态电池还未准备好，但凝胶电池已经准备好
zh.summary: 虽然固态电池仍未准备好广泛采用，但凝胶电解质电池正在成为替代易失效锂离子技术的更可行的短期解决方案。这种转变是由电动自行车爆炸和移动电源燃烧等事件的安全问题所推动的。

title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
summary: Anthropic's suspension of access to new models has prompted Indian tech leaders to reassess the country's artificial intelligence strategy and independence. The incident is being viewed as a potential catalyst for India to accelerate its own AI development capabilities and reduce reliance on external platforms.
content: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

zh.title: 随着Anthropic暂停新模型的访问权限，印度讨论其AI的未来
zh.summary: 由于Anthropic暂停新模型的访问权限，印度科技领导者被促使重新评估该国的人工智能战略和独立性。这一事件被视为印度加快自身AI发展能力并减少对外部平台依赖的潜在催化剂。

title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
summary: Meta is dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition following a directive from Beijing to reverse the deal. The company is working to unwind the investment in response to Chinese government pressure.
content: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

zh.title: Meta据称在北京要求后准备放弃20亿美元Manus交易
zh.summary: Meta在北京的指令下正在清算其20亿美元的Manus收购。该公司正应对中国政府压力而努力解除这项投资。
